name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Rejoice!
body:
"Why do you seek the living among the dead? He is not here, but
has risen."

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

As we celebrate our risen Savior this Easter,
I want to thank you for your prayers and support to inspire
Christians in America to boldly live out their faith.

Together, we're building a nation that gains
hope and strength from the voice of God's people in the public
square. And I'm encouraged by the amazing impact we have already
had and look forward to seeing the difference we will make
together in the days and months ahead.

So, thank you again, and I pray you and your
family have a wonderful Easter!

Sincerely,

Jason Yates
Chief Executive Officer
My Faith Votes

My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement
focused on motivating Christians in America to be active members
of society and participate in local and national elections. By
partnering with local churches, pastors and national faith
leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead
the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics.

name: Tom Perez
subject: We'll fly you and a friend out to join me and Bernie in Las Vegas
body:
You and a friend could win a free trip to Las Vegas.
---
**Pitch in $3 or more before midnight tomorrow night to be automatically entered for a chance to join Tom and Bernie on the Come Together and Fight Back Tour in Las Vegas!

** **[ENTER](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc88/464093198/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Tom-and-Bernie-in-Vegas-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd")**
Friend --

January 20th was an important day, but January 21st was far more important because of what you did.

It would have been easy to sit back and lick our wounds and wait for the next election to come around.

Instead, we marched together, stood together, and spoke up together to challenge the Trump administration and Republican-led Congress. And to move our party forward and win elections, we have to keep coming together in support of our common goals.

That's why I'm going on tour across the country to talk with folks like you about how we can unify the Democratic Party. I'm thrilled to have my friend Bernie Sanders on the road with me.

And I want to make sure you have an opportunity to be a part of this, too.

So here's an exciting opportunity for you: join us for the final stop of our tour in Las Vegas! We'll fly you and a friend out and give you VIP passes to the big event -- just pitch in $3 or more to be automatically entered for a chance to win.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc89/464093198/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/come-together-and-fight-back-contest?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc96/464093198/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/come-together-and-fight-back-contest?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc97/464093198/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/come-together-and-fight-back-contest?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc94/464093198/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/come-together-and-fight-back-contest?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc95/464093198/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/come-together-and-fight-back-contest?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc92/464093198/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/Tom-and-Bernie-in-Vegas-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd")
** Your grassroots donations help us do big things -- like this tour -- to organize Democrats around the country so we can win elections. Good luck, and I can't wait to thank you in person for everything you're doing to elect Democrats.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

|

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 4/16/17. [Enter by contributing here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc93/464093198/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/tour-contest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Enter+by+contributing+here&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd"), or click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc90/464093198/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/tour-contest-signup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Las Vegas, NV; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; the opportunity for winner and winner's guest to attend a DNC event on 4/22/17 (approximate retail value of all prizes $3,000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc91/464093198/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/tour-contest-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd") and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc9e/464093198/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc9f/464093198/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc9c/464093198/VEsHBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9a4/4067b0a/2ea216883/7e72bc9d/464093198/VEsHAQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170415_tp_nd&source=em_20170415_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170415_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Democrats.org
subject: ✈️ You + a friend + Tom + Bernie (in Las Vegas) ✈️
body:
Join Tom and Bernie in Las Vegas! **Pitch in $10 or more before midnight tomorrow night to be automatically entered for a chance to join Tom and Bernie on the Come Together and Fight Back Tour in Las Vegas!

** **[ENTER](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9bd/4067b0a/2e9d33145/7e72a783/3170953577/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Tom-and-Bernie-in-Vegas-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER&utm_campaign=em_20170415_dnc_rem&source=em_20170415_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170415_dnc_rem")**

One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Las Vegas, NV; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; the opportunity for winner and winner's guest to attend a DNC event on 4/22/17 (approximate retail value of all prizes $3,000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9bd/4067b0a/2e9d33145/7e72a799/3170953577/VEsEAg/ "http://my.democrats.org/tour-contest-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20170415_dnc_rem&source=em_20170415_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170415_dnc_rem") and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9bd/4067b0a/2e9d33145/7e72a7a6/3170953577/VEsEDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170415_dnc_rem&source=em_20170415_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170415_dnc_rem"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9bd/4067b0a/2e9d33145/7e72a7a7/3170953577/VEsEDA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170415_dnc_rem&source=em_20170415_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170415_dnc_rem"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9bd/4067b0a/2e9d33145/7e72a7a4/3170953577/VEsFBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170415_dnc_rem&source=em_20170415_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170415_dnc_rem") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9bd/4067b0a/2e9d33145/7e72a7a5/3170953577/VEsFBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170415_dnc_rem&source=em_20170415_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170415_dnc_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Team DSCC
subject: Bernie Sanders: "a new era of Democratic leadership"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Democrats are bringing the fight to the GOP and Donald Trump -- and our Senators need you more than ever to help lead the charge.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170415-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170415-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170415-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170415-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170415-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170415-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**A quick note on your support, friend:**

The resistance isn't just limited to a few blue states. After Trump's inauguration, we saw women's marches in every state in the country. We saw nationwide rallies on health care. And now, we're continuing to take the fight to Republican strongholds.

With 99% of our donations coming from grassroots democrats giving $200 or less, we really mean it when we say we're counting on you.

Please consider making a contribution of any amount today.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170415-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Derivative of Gage Skidmore [Photo](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1de/2b07114c/5f083ee2/736c0214/2206885624/VEsO/ "https://www.flickr.com/photos/gageskidmore/19825337191/") [Creative Commons 2.0](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1de/2b07114c/5f083ee2/736c0217/2206885624/VEsP/ "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1de/2b07114c/5f083ee2/736c0216/2206885624/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1de/2b07114c/5f083ee2/736c0211/2206885624/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1de/2b07114c/5f083ee2/736c0210/2206885624/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
